_note: TensorRT 10.3 FP16/INT8 engines, densenet121-res224 on Jetson Orin Nano Super (MAXN_SUPER). Throughput = validated full-clock peak (trtexec, hundreds of averaged iterations each); corroborated by the 20-min endurance test holding 508 img/s. AUROC re-verified on 2000 labeled ChestMNIST images with 1000-sample bootstrap standard error (accuracy is clock-independent, so unaffected by GPU throttling).

int8._note: INT8 post-training quantization (entropy calibration on 512 ChestMNIST images), densenet-nih. AUROC on 2000 labeled test images; auroc_se = 1000-sample bootstrap standard error.
